testcase.name: test_login_returns_profile_name[pmo@altair.fr]
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_permissions_chantier.py:30: in test_login_returns_profile_name assert r.status_code == 200, f"Login failed for {account['email']}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed for pmo@altair.fr: {"detail":"Identifiants invalides"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_has_wildcard_permission

failure.message: AssertionError: Admin missing admin permissions: [] assert ('*' in [] or False) + where False = any(<generator object TestLoginProfileName.test_admin_has_wildcard_permission.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xff3c36e27d80>)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_permissions_chantier.py:49: in test_admin_has_wildcard_permission assert "*" in perms or any(p.startswith("admin.") for p in perms), \ E AssertionError: Admin missing admin permissions: [] E assert ('*' in [] or False) E + where False = any(<generator object TestLoginProfileName.test_admin_has_wildcard_permission.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xff3c36e27d80>)

testcase.name: test_user_has_only_timesheets_permission

failure.message: AssertionError: user@altair.fr missing timesheets.submit: [] assert 'timesheets.submit' in []

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_permissions_chantier.py:61: in test_user_has_only_timesheets_permission assert "timesheets.submit" in perms, f"user@altair.fr missing timesheets.submit: {perms}" E AssertionError: user@altair.fr missing timesheets.submit: [] E assert 'timesheets.submit' in []

testcase.name: test_achats_has_dashboard_and_vendors

failure.message: AssertionError: achats missing dashboard.view: [] assert 'dashboard.view' in []

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_permissions_chantier.py:85: in test_achats_has_dashboard_and_vendors assert "dashboard.view" in perms, f"achats missing dashboard.view: {perms}" E AssertionError: achats missing dashboard.view: [] E assert 'dashboard.view' in []
